title: How to Use AI to Build Proof-of-Work and Become More Valuable
description:
Most people are using AI wrong — they collect tools and never produce anything they can show. In this video I break down the exact system I use to turn AI into proof-of-work: real, finished, documented projects that make you more valuable to employers, clients, and your own team.

I'm Nat O'Farril. I work in enterprise marketing and I'm building Senioto in public while still working in corporate. No hype, no income promises — just the system.

What's inside:
— What proof-of-work actually means (and what it isn't)
— Why AI alone is not enough
— The Senioto framework: Learn AI. Build proof. Grow your value.
— A real example: the Brief-to-ZIP AI email development workflow
— What to build first if you're starting from zero
— How to package proof so people actually understand it

Chapters:

9:20 Subscribe

Subscribe if you want to build proof-of-work that makes you impossible to ignore.

Learn AI. Build proof. Grow your value.

pinnedComment: This is the system Senioto is built on: Learn AI. Build proof. Grow your value. What's the first proof-of-work project you're building — or stuck on? Drop it below and I'll point you at the next step.
